reasoning: The document exhibits high textual fidelity with a composite score of 0.9727 and excellent shingling metrics. However, the LLM fidelity check identified 1 major structural defect: the use of literal bullet characters instead of semantic list formatting within table cells. Additionally, a minor programmatic issue was found regarding time values in table headers. Per the count-based routing thresholds, the presence of 1 major defect mandates a route to HUMAN_REVIEW.

concerns.analysis: The source document contains bulleted lists under the agenda topics (e.g., under 'Project Finance Update'). In the output JSON, these bulleted items are extracted as plain text within the table cells, using the literal bullet character '•' instead of proper markdown list formatting (such as '- ' or '* ') or list elements. This will result in the bullets rendering as plain text paragraphs with symbol characters rather than semantically structured HTML lists.

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 1 table(s) have time values in <th> cells: "10:00-10:10"
concerns.analysis: data_in_th_time=1, no_th_tables=0. Minor semantic markup issues: tables lack <th> elements or use time values as headers. These affect screen reader context but are less severe than data misrepresentation.

action_items: Convert literal bullet characters inside table cells into proper semantic HTML lists
Review table header structure to ensure time ranges are not incorrectly tagged as <th> elements
